title: Yodyut Muay Thai Kids
shortDesc: Authentic Muay Thai training with 8 full-time Thai trainers — structured supervised classes for children from age 8.
description: Yodyut Muay Thai Gym near Choeng Mon Beach is one of Koh Samui's most established Muay Thai facilities with 8 full-time Thai trainers, two full-sized boxing rings, bags, matted floors and strength equipment. Classes are tailored to each student's level and the gym is specifically described as well-supervised for girls and children. A great discipline-building activity for kids 8 and above.
priceNote: Contact gym directly for class fees
